claims.summary: The fixed-seed projection is deterministic but still needs basis-health evidence.
claims.disposition: Verified stable checksum, finite norms, dead-dimension detection, overlap bounds, and repeatability.

claims.summary: f32 accumulation may diverge from a higher-precision reference.
claims.disposition: Verified the existing f64 reference accumulator and bounded maximum-delta regression.

claims.summary: Static basis health cannot rule out semantic-cluster striping.
claims.disposition: Route a bounded fixture comparison across known embedding clusters without changing the live projection basis.
